creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 253109
v1 (apply via "git am")

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D47139 for the *gory* details (I'm dead serious)

Re-emphasising that building in-place or otherwise unclean environments will not work and is unsupported due to upstream's circular dependency situation; you must use isolated environments like poudriere.
